description_long: This is a multi-functional wooden desk and shelving unit, featuring a light oak finish with a modern, asymmetrical design. The left side includes a tall open shelving section with two vertical compartments and a smaller horizontal shelf, ideal for books or decorative items. The main workspace is spacious, with a curved right edge that transitions into a set of three drawers with metallic handles, providing ample storage for office supplies. Below the desktop, there is an open compartment suitable for a computer tower or additional storage, and a solid panel on the left for structural support. The surfaces are flat and sturdy, making them suitable for supporting electronics, books, or other items. The overall construction appears robust, with visible screws and hardware reinforcing the panels.
description: A modern light oak desk with open shelves, a spacious work surface, and three storage drawers with metallic handles. The design features both open and closed compartments for versatile storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelving on the left, central workspace, and three drawers on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the solid side panel.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the layout of the shelves, curved desktop, and drawer arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the drawers and the curved desktop edge.
